item.description: Vice President JD Vance departed for Switzerland from Joint Base Andrews for U.S.-Iran negotiations, as tensions between Israel and Lebanon remained high. Iran said Saturday that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, citing ceasefire violations after Israel continued deadly strikes in southern Lebanon overnight.

media:content.media:title: Vice President JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran negotiations
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance departed for Switzerland from Joint Base Andrews for U.S.-Iran negotiations, as tensions between Israel and Lebanon remained high. Iran said Saturday that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, citing ceasefire violations after Israel continued deadly strikes in southern Lebanon overnight.

item.title: Vice President JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran negotiations

item.dc:creator: Megan Shannon
Monica Alba
Dan De Luce
Courtney Kube
item.description: WASHINGTON — The effort by the U.S. and Iran to negotiate an end to the war has been defined by dramatic fits and starts and punctuated by missile strikes and naval blockades.

media:content.media:text: France's President Emmanuel Macro welcomes President Donald Trump at Chateau de Versailles on June 17, 2026.
media:content.media:description: France's President Emmanuel Macron welcomes President Donald Trump at Chateau de Versailles on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump signs Iran deal at Versailles.
media:content.media:description: France's President Emmanuel Macron welcomes President Donald Trump at Chateau de Versailles on Wednesday.

item.title: Iran peace talks have been chaotic. But confusion has only grown since the MOU was signed.

item.dc:creator: Ashley Mowreader
item.description: Americans have spent an estimated $33 billion more in gas since the Iran war started. According to an NBC News analysis, drivers who fill up twice a month paid anywhere from $20 to $300 more for gas.

media:content.media:text: A sign displays fuel prices at a Mobil gas station
media:content.media:description: A sign displays fuel prices at a Mobil gas station in San Diego on May 4. California gas prices are the highest in the U.S., but they have increased less since the war in Iran began than in most states.

item.title: Gas cost calculator: How much have higher gas prices cost you?

item.description: Vice President JD Vance departed for Switzerland from Joint Base Andrews for U.S.-Iran negotiations, as tensions between Israel and Lebanon remained high. Iran said Saturday that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, citing ceasefire violations after Israel continued deadly strikes in southern Lebanon overnight.

media:content.media:title: Vice President JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran negotiations
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance departed for Switzerland from Joint Base Andrews for U.S.-Iran negotiations, as tensions between Israel and Lebanon remained high. Iran said Saturday that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, citing ceasefire violations after Israel continued deadly strikes in southern Lebanon overnight.

item.title: Vice President JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran negotiations

item.dc:creator: Rich Schapiro
item.description: Greg Baer, the founder of the Real Love Company, told his followers to call him Daddy and held them in his lap as if they were babies.

media:content.media:text: Greg Baer in a Real Love YouTube video.
Despite being a high achiever, Veena Dinavahi struggled with anxiety and depression as an adolescent.
Veena Dinavahi at her home in New York City on May 21.
Veena's marriage certificate to her former husband, officiated by Greg Baer.
Veena's tattoos, which she got after leaving Real Love.
A selection of Greg Baer's books.
Former Real Love member Inge Jechart with Bauer and his wife, Donna.
Baer and Inge Jechart.
Veena at home in New York.
Veena's memoir, "The True Happiness Company," which details her time with Real Love.

item.title: The Real Love Company made her feel whole. Then ‘Daddy’ said to strip naked.

item.description: Sebastián Beccacece aseguró que Ecuador llega entusiasmado al duelo ante Curazao y destacó las fortalezas del rival en las transiciones. El técnico afirmó que la prioridad de La Tri es enfocarse en su juego y ganar el partido.

media:content.media:title: Beccacece: "Pensamos en nosotros y en ganar"
media:content.media:description: Sebastián Beccacece aseguró que Ecuador llega entusiasmado al duelo ante Curazao y destacó las fortalezas del rival en las transiciones. El técnico afirmó que la prioridad de La Tri es enfocarse en su juego y ganar el partido.

item.title: Beccacece: "Pensamos en nosotros y en ganar"

item.description: El campeón del mundo analizó el ajustado triunfo germano ante Costa de Marfil, lo reafirmó como favorito al título y advirtió que Ecuador vencerá esta noche a Curazao para apretar el Grupo E y buscar su pase a los 16vos.

media:content.media:title: Jorge Valdano: "A Alemania no le sobró técnica ni fantasía, pero ganó a lo alemán" | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: El campeón del mundo analizó el ajustado triunfo germano ante Costa de Marfil, lo reafirmó como favorito al título y advirtió que Ecuador vencerá esta noche a Curazao para apretar el Grupo E y buscar su pase a los 16vos.

item.title: Jorge Valdano: "A Alemania no le sobró técnica ni fantasía, pero ganó a lo alemán" | Pasión Mundial

item.description: El entrenador alemán destacó el riesgo ofensivo de su equipo en el segundo tiempo y el apoyo entre jugadores para darle la vuelta al marcador. Sobre la titularidad de Deniz Undav, es una opción a evaluar, pero elogió su función de cambio.

media:content.media:title: Nagelsmann: “Lo que distingue al grupo es que están ahí los unos para los otros”
media:content.media:description: El entrenador alemán destacó el riesgo ofensivo de su equipo en el segundo tiempo y el apoyo entre jugadores para darle la vuelta al marcador. Sobre la titularidad de Deniz Undav, es una opción a evaluar, pero elogió su función de cambio.

item.title: Nagelsmann: “Lo que distingue al grupo es que están ahí los unos para los otros”

item.description: La selección de Ecuador llegó en autobús al estadio de Kansas City, recorrió los camerinos y realizó el reconocimiento del campo antes de enfrentar a Curazao en un partido clave del Grupo E del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡La Tri ya está en Kansas City y va por un triunfo clave!
media:content.media:description: La selección de Ecuador llegó en autobús al estadio de Kansas City, recorrió los camerinos y realizó el reconocimiento del campo antes de enfrentar a Curazao en un partido clave del Grupo E del Mundial 2026.

item.title: ¡La Tri ya está en Kansas City y va por un triunfo clave!

item.description: El defensor alemán habló al terminar el juego entre su selección y Costa de Marfil, partido que sentenciaron los teutones apenas en el final del segundo tiempo, y con goles que salieron de la banca. Se mostró confiado en la respuesta que daría su grupo.

media:content.media:title: Jonathan Tah: "Sabíamos que en algún momento acabaríamos cansando al rival"
media:content.media:description: El defensor alemán habló al terminar el juego entre su selección y Costa de Marfil, partido que sentenciaron los teutones apenas en el final del segundo tiempo, y con goles que salieron de la banca. Se mostró confiado en la respuesta que daría su grupo.

item.title: Jonathan Tah: "Sabíamos que en algún momento acabaríamos cansando al rival"

item.description: Jordy Caicedo aseguró que Ecuador llega con confianza y gran exigencia al duelo ante Curazao en Kansas City. El delantero destacó que el rival suele dejar espacios y afirmó que, en una Copa del Mundo, la obligación es salir a buscar la victoria.

media:content.media:title: Jordy Caicedo confía en que Ecuador sumará tres puntos ante Curazao
media:content.media:description: Jordy Caicedo aseguró que Ecuador llega con confianza y gran exigencia al duelo ante Curazao en Kansas City. El delantero destacó que el rival suele dejar espacios y afirmó que, en una Copa del Mundo, la obligación es salir a buscar la victoria.

item.title: Jordy Caicedo confía en que Ecuador sumará tres puntos ante Curazao

item.description: Costa de Marfil sorprendió con gol de Franck Kessié, pero Alemania reaccionó en el segundo tiempo con doblete de Deniz Undav, quien marcó el empate y luego firmó la remontada al 90+4’.

media:content.media:title: Alemania lo da vuelta sobre la hora y deja sin premio a Costa de Marfil
media:content.media:description: Costa de Marfil sorprendió con gol de Franck Kessié, pero Alemania reaccionó en el segundo tiempo con doblete de Deniz Undav, quien marcó el empate y luego firmó la remontada al 90+4’.

item.title: Alemania lo da vuelta sobre la hora y deja sin premio a Costa de Marfil

item.description: La selección de Curazao llegó al estadio de Kansas City, recorrió los camerinos y realizó el reconocimiento del campo antes de medirse con Ecuador, tras caer ante Alemania en su debut mundialista.

media:content.media:title: Curazao ya está en Kansas City para enfrentar a Ecuador
media:content.media:description: La selección de Curazao llegó al estadio de Kansas City, recorrió los camerinos y realizó el reconocimiento del campo antes de medirse con Ecuador, tras caer ante Alemania en su debut mundialista.

item.title: Curazao ya está en Kansas City para enfrentar a Ecuador

item.description: El entrenador Julian Nagelsmann festeja los goles del jugador que sustituyó a Musiala, Deniz Undav, quien anota el empate y el gol de la victoria de los teutones ante Costa de Marfil al minuto 90’ + 4’.

media:content.media:title: Vuelta al partido: Julian Nagelsmann celebra los goles de Deniz Undav
media:content.media:description: El entrenador Julian Nagelsmann festeja los goles del jugador que sustituyó a Musiala, Deniz Undav, quien anota el empate y el gol de la victoria de los teutones ante Costa de Marfil al minuto 90’ + 4’.

item.title: Vuelta al partido: Julian Nagelsmann celebra los goles de Deniz Undav

item.description: Deniz Undav volvió a aparecer en el momento clave. El delantero firmó su doblete de la noche para completar la remontada alemana ante Costa de Marfil y encender el duelo del Grupo E.

media:content.media:title: ¡Alemania le da la vuelta al marcador con doblete de Deniz Undav!
media:content.media:description: Deniz Undav volvió a aparecer en el momento clave. El delantero firmó su doblete de la noche para completar la remontada alemana ante Costa de Marfil y encender el duelo del Grupo E.

item.title: ¡Alemania le da la vuelta al marcador con doblete de Deniz Undav!

item.dc:creator: Stephanie Perry
John Lapinski
item.description: For Thomas Jefferson, James Madison and other bold-face names struggling to bring about a new nation, an educated and informed citizenry was essential to the success of the American experiment.

media:content.media:text: Capitol Tourists
media:content.media:description: A tour group enters the Capitol rotunda as morning sun lights up the statues of Ulysses S. Grant and Abraham Lincoln in 2024.

item.title: Americans believe they aren’t being taught enough about democracy

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: Severe storms, flash flooding and extreme heat are battering parts of the Plains, Midwest and the South this weekend, threatening to disrupt World Cup fans, athletes and holiday travelers alike

media:content.media:text: A person looks out towards a flooded neighborhood after Tropical Storm Arthur made landfall.
media:content.media:description: A person looks out toward a flooded neighborhood in Freeport, Texas, after Tropical Storm Arthur made landfall on June 17.

item.title: Storms, floods and scorching heat grip the U.S. as World Cup and holiday travel peak

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
item.description: An Al Jazeera cameraman was killed in an Israeli airstrike in central Gaza on Saturday, the outlet said, less than three months after his brother, also an Al Jazeera journalist, was killed in a separate strike

media:content.media:text: Displaced Palestinian families struggle with rising temperatures in Gaza.
media:content.media:description: A view of Bureij Camp in Gaza City on June 9.

item.title: Al Jazeera cameraman killed in Gaza months after his journalist brother died in a separate strike

item.description: Watch live coverage as Vice President JD Vance holds a press briefing at the White House.

media:content.media:title: Vance holds White House press briefing
media:content.media:description: Watch live coverage as Vice President JD Vance holds a press briefing at the White House.

item.title: Vance holds White House press briefing

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Meriam Bouarrouj
item.description: Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel will take a two-month break from hosting his eponymous ABC program, tapping comedian and frequent Donald Trump foe Rosie O’Donnell as one of several guest hosts to fill in during his absence.“I hope you’re paying attention this summer, because I will be taking the next two months off — this time voluntarily,” he said on “Jimmy Kimmel Live!” Thursday evening, joking about his suspension last year for his comments about reactions to conservator commentato

media:content.media:text: Jimmy Kimmel.
media:content.media:description: Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel will take a two-month break from hosting his eponymous ABC program.

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel taps Rosie O’Donnell as rotating guest host during two-month hiatus

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
item.description: An Al Jazeera cameraman was killed in an Israeli airstrike in central Gaza on Saturday, the outlet said, less than three months after his brother, also an Al Jazeera journalist, was killed in a separate strike

media:content.media:text: Displaced Palestinian families struggle with rising temperatures in Gaza.
media:content.media:description: A view of Bureij Camp in Gaza City on June 9.

item.title: Al Jazeera cameraman killed in Gaza months after his journalist brother died in a separate strike

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Russian bombs struck an apartment building on Saturday in Kharkiv, Ukraine’s second-largest city, killing at least one person and wounding nine, including a 6-year-old child, authorities said.

media:content.media:text: Kharkiv strike.
media:content.media:description: Rescuers carry a body that they removed from under the rubble of an apartment building following Russia's missile attack in Kharkiv, Ukraine, on June 20.

item.title: Russia strikes an apartment building in the Ukrainian city of Kharkiv and 1 person is killed

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
item.description: One person was killed and five others were wounded in a shooting in Kansas City, Missouri, Friday night, according to police

media:content.media:text: Detail of Kansas City State of Missouri Police.
media:content.media:description: Detail of Kansas City State of Missouri Police patch on June 16, 2026, in Kansas City.

item.title: 1 dead and 5 wounded in Kansas City shooting

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: Severe storms, flash flooding and extreme heat are battering parts of the Plains, Midwest and the South this weekend, threatening to disrupt World Cup fans, athletes and holiday travelers alike

media:content.media:text: A person looks out towards a flooded neighborhood after Tropical Storm Arthur made landfall.

item.title: Storms, floods and scorching heat grip the U.S. as World Cup and holiday travel peak

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Andrew Greif
Greg Rosenstein
Tim Rohan
item.description: In the sports world, the past 10 days have been, for lack of a better word, a little wild.

media:content.media:text: Karl-Anthony Towns #32 of the New York Knicks celebrates with the Larry O'Brien Championship Trophy
media:content.media:description: Karl-Anthony Towns of the New York Knicks celebrates with the Larry O'Brien Championship Trophy at City Hall on June 18, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Knicks Championship Parade Basketball
media:content.media:description: Karl-Anthony Towns of the New York Knicks celebrates with the Larry O'Brien Championship Trophy at City Hall on June 18, 2026.

media:content.media:text: UFC Freedom 250 event on the White House lawn

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Morocco: Group C - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Karl-Anthony Towns of the New York Knicks celebrates with the Larry O'Brien Championship Trophy at City Hall on June 18, 2026.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Our reporters take you behind the scenes of a historic stretch in sports
